p2p_enrich.notes: Added CI-based pass-to-pass test: test_repo_ruff_check. Docker image built successfully. Verified ruff check passes on modified files (src/prime_rl/trainer/rl/loss.py, src/prime_rl/configs/trainer.py). The repo uses uv sync and pytest for unit tests, but GPU is required for most tests. Ruff linting from style.yaml CI workflow was the most feasible repo_tests command. Updated test_outputs.py with subprocess.run() based test_repo_ruff_check() function. Updated eval_manifest.yaml with repo_ruff_check entry.

validate.notes: Fixed rubric rules - removed rule that checked BUGBOT.md which is not in judge CONFIG_PATTERNS. All 4 checks pass: Docker OK, NOP=0, Gold=1, Rubric=1.0
